title: WWII Tanks: Forgotten Battles
description:
WWII Tanks: Forgotten Battles
Choose your side USA/Great Britain, Axis or USSR!
Participate in the biggest historical tank battles of World War II!
Go through the entire war on different tanks, feel the horror of war on your skin!

Game Features:
 • Beautiful graphics
 • Realistic tanks of the WWII
 • Historical maps and battles
 • Possibility to choose tanks
Game mode: • Single Missions
 • Three Campaigns (USA/UK, AXIS and URSS) 

Wide selection of famous WWII tanks:Germany: • Tiger 1
 • Panzer-IV
 • Sdkfz251
 • Mörser Karl
USSR: • T-34/76
 • T-34/85
 • KV-I
 • KV-II
 • BT-7
 • T-35
Japan: • Type 89
Finland: 
 • BT-42
United Kingdom: • Cromwell
 • Sherman Firefly
and many more.
description_short: Choose your side USA/Great Britain, Axis or USSR!Participate in the biggest historical tank battles of World War II!Go through the entire war on different tanks, feel the horror of war on your skin!
